title: HistoricalDailySnapshotData
description: End-of-day balance snapshot for a specific date.

totalCurrencyIso.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the total figures in native currency.

totalCash.description: Total cash across all accounts in native currency.

totalInvestedAmount.description: Total invested amount across all accounts in native currency.

totalPnl.description: Total profit and loss across all accounts in native currency.

totalBalance.description: Total balance across all accounts in native currency.

displayTotalCash.description: Total cash converted to the requested display currency.

displayTotalInvestedAmount.description: Total invested amount converted to the requested display currency.

displayTotalPnl.description: Total profit and loss converted to the requested display currency.

displayTotalBalance.description: Total balance converted to the requested display currency.

totalExchangeRate.description: Exchange rate applied to convert totals to displayCurrency.

accountSnapshots.description: Individual account breakdowns within this snapshot.
